product_overview: AssetCare is a web-based SaaS for tracking assets, maintenance, service records, documents and billing from a single dashboard. The MVP focuses on showing quick value (first 10 minutes), preventing missed maintenance, and centralizing asset-related records.
core_goals: Show measurable value to new users within the first 10 minutes
Make maintenance and warranty risk visible and actionable
Unify asset, document, service and billing workflows in a single app
Enforce free-plan quotas at the backend and surface clear error messages
Ensure session-protected access to user data and flows

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Email/password sign-up and sign-in with session-protected routes and redirects to protected areas.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Login button -> See /dashboard
Navigate to /register -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Register button -> See welcome/confirmation and redirect to /dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill email field with wrong credentials -> Fill password field with wrong password -> Click Login button -> See authentication error message

features.name: Asset Management
features.description: Create, view, edit and delete assets; attach media files and view asset details.
user_flows: Navigate to /assets -> Click Create asset button -> Fill asset name field -> Select category -> Fill metadata fields -> Upload media file -> Click Save -> See new asset listed on /assets -> Click listed asset -> Navigate to /assets/[id] -> See asset details and media
Navigate to /assets -> Click asset edit action -> Change metadata field -> Click Save -> See updated asset in list and on /assets/[id]
Navigate to /assets -> Click Create asset button -> Fill form and upload invalid file type -> Click Save -> See file upload validation error
Navigate to /assets -> Click Create asset button -> Fill form -> Click Save when user has already reached free plan asset limit -> See 'Free plan limit reached' error message

features.name: Maintenance Rules
features.description: Define recurring maintenance for assets, compute next due dates and mark maintenance completed.
user_flows: Navigate to /maintenance -> Click Add maintenance rule -> Select an asset -> Set interval and next due date -> Click Save -> See new rule listed with calculated next maintenance date
Navigate to /maintenance -> Click rule action to mark completed -> Confirm completion -> See rule updated with next calculated due date
Navigate to /maintenance -> Click Add maintenance rule -> Set invalid interval (e.g., empty or negative) -> Click Save -> See validation error indicating required interval

features.name: Service Logs
features.description: Create and manage service records tied to assets with optional media/receipt uploads and cost entry.
user_flows: Navigate to /services -> Click Create service entry -> Select asset -> Fill notes field -> Enter cost value -> Upload receipt image -> Click Save -> See new service entry in /services list
Navigate to /services -> Click service entry -> Click Edit -> Change notes or cost -> Click Save -> See updated service entry
Navigate to /services -> Click Create service entry -> Upload file larger than allowed size -> Click Save -> See file size/upload error message

features.name: Document Management
features.description: Upload, list, filter and delete warranty, invoice and other documents; enforce document quotas on free plan.
user_flows: Navigate to /documents -> Click Upload document -> Select file -> Choose document type -> Click Upload -> See document appear in /documents list
Navigate to /documents -> Use type filter -> Select warranty -> See list filtered to warranty documents
Navigate to /documents -> Click Upload document -> Select file -> Click Upload when free plan document quota already reached -> See 'Free plan document limit reached' error message

features.name: Dashboard and Analytics
features.description: KPI cards, timeline and cost metrics to surface asset health and spend trends.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See KPI widgets and summary cards populated from /api/dashboard-metrics -> Click date range control -> Select new date range -> See KPI widgets and charts update
Navigate to /dashboard with no asset or service data -> See empty state and guidance for next steps

features.name: Billing and Subscription
features.description: Manage subscriptions and invoices, support Stripe checkout and webhook-confirmed payment state.
user_flows: Navigate to /billing -> Click Manage subscription -> Navigate to /subscriptions -> Click Upgrade or Checkout -> Start checkout -> Complete payment flow -> See subscription listed on /subscriptions and billing update on /billing
Navigate to /billing -> Click Start checkout -> Enter payment details -> Submit payment -> Receive payment failure response -> See payment failed error and retry option
Navigate to /invoices -> See invoice list -> Click invoice -> See invoice details and status

features.name: Reporting
features.description: Generate exportable PDF reports for assets and maintenance/service history across selectable date ranges.
user_flows: Navigate to /reports -> Select report scope (assets or maintenance) -> Set date range -> Click Generate report -> See generated PDF download link -> Click Download -> Receive PDF file
Navigate to /reports -> Select date range with no matching data -> Click Generate report -> See 'no data available for selected range' message

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Email/password sign-up, sign-in and session-protected routes.
user_interactions: Enter credentials and submit login form.
Navigate to protected pages with active session.

features.name: Asset Management
features.description: Create, list, update and delete assets with media attachments.
user_interactions: Create a new asset with category and metadata.
Upload and view asset media files.

features.name: Maintenance Rules
features.description: Define recurring maintenance and track upcoming maintenance dates.
user_interactions: Add maintenance rule to an asset.
Update maintenance interval and due settings.
Mark maintenance completed and review next date.

features.name: Service Logs
features.description: Store service records and related media.
user_interactions: Create service entry with notes and cost.

features.name: Dashboard and Analytics
features.description: Display KPI cards, timelines and cost metrics.

features.name: Billing and Subscription
features.description: Manage subscriptions/invoices and Stripe payment flows.
user_interactions: Start checkout flow and confirm payment state.

features.name: Reporting
features.description: Generate reports and export PDF for asset/maintenance history.
user_interactions: Select report scope and date range.

known_limitations.issue: Free plan quotas are constrained (asset/document/subscription/invoice limits).
known_limitations.impact: Users hit hard limits unless upgraded.

known_limitations.issue: Team/collaboration workflow is not implemented in MVP.
